comment: Publish turns your exhibit into a static site — shareable, indexable, hostable anywhere.
Choose where it goes: a local folder, a downloadable zip, or straight to GitHub Pages.
For GitHub, give a repo, a branch, and a personal access token; Archie pushes the built pages.
Each step reports its status — working, done, or the exact error if something fails.
Published pages carry SEO metadata — OpenGraph and Twitter tags, schema.org JSON-LD, a sitemap — so links preview richly and search engines index them.
_showoff: Invisible in UI; box the SEO note, or pair with a link-preview card screenshot.
